description: You are a backend developer maintaining a Python PDF generation service. The 'invoice_renderer' project at ~/PycharmProjects/invoice_renderer/ is producing invalid invoices in production. Resolve the following three critical issues: financial totals are off due to floating-point errors (use Decimal arithmetic), customer credit card numbers are being printed in plain text (apply PCI-compliant masking), and long product lists overlap with the page footer instead of breaking to a new page. Ensure all 12 tests in the project's test suite pass.
